articles.title: Katherine Legge adds Coca-Cola 600 to Indianapolis 500 entry - ESPN
articles.description: Katherine Legge will attempt to become the first woman to complete the "double" by racing in the Indianapolis 500 and Coca-Cola 600 on the same day.
articles.content:
May 13, 2026, 07:03 AM ET
Katherine Legge will attempt to become the first woman to complete the "double" by racing in the Indianapolis 500 and Coca-Cola 600 on the same day.
